headline: Analyst Loweres Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG) Price Target by $5
summary: Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated (NYSE:PEG) is included among the 15 Best Nuclear Power Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts.
